prompt: I need to add a 'copy to clipboard' feature to the MarkdownPreviewView. When a user right-clicks on the rendered markdown, they should see a 'Copy Text' option in the context menu. This is in a project at /Users/josh_folder/harness-simple/creator-test/markdown-tool-bare/

assertions.name: detects_missing_agents_md
assertions.check: Output explicitly mentions AGENTS.md is missing or not found

assertions.name: does_not_skip_detection
assertions.check: Does not jump to writing code or creating an execution plan before addressing the missing AGENTS.md

assertions.name: offers_options
assertions.check: Offers either to invoke harness-creator or explains limitations of proceeding without it
